summary: Iteration 22: Image Upload Architecture + Admin Health Tab Testing Complete. 20/20 backend tests passed. All new features verified: multipart image upload with 5MB cap and magic-byte validation, background variant generation queue, admin image queue stats, admin CDN health probe with wrong_redirect detection. Frontend verified: Settings page loads without smsOpt ReferenceError, Admin Health tab shows all 3 sections (system services, image queue stats, CDN probe), passkey reauth input focus fix confirmed in code.

issues: React key warning for list items

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/sell/image-upload correctly validates magic bytes (JPG/PNG/WebP), rejects text/PDF files with 400
5MB per-file cap enforced with 413 response for oversized files
Background variant generation queue correctly enqueues jobs and updates status
GET /api/images/status returns status + manifest for given shas
GET /api/admin/image-queue returns queue stats (pending, in_flight) + db stats (optimized, optimizing, failed, original_uploaded) + failed items list
POST /api/admin/image-queue/retry correctly requires admin auth and returns 404 for non-existent images
GET /api/admin/cdn-health correctly probes img.autoandbid.bg and detects wrong_redirect=true when CF returns 301 to different host
PasskeySection.jsx has inline reauth gate JSX (not nested component) to prevent input focus loss - fix documented in code comments
AccountSettingsPage.jsx no longer references smsOpt - SMS section converted to phone-only contact field
seed_data_creation: Test images uploaded during backend tests (auto-cleaned by content-addressed storage)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 validated the new image upload architecture. Key findings: (1) POST /api/sell/image-upload accepts multipart uploads, validates magic bytes (rejects text/PDF), enforces 5MB cap, returns {url, sha, ext, size_bytes, status='optimizing'}. (2) Background variant generation queue is working - uploads trigger optimization jobs. (3) Admin Health tab has 3 sections: system services (all OK), image queue (6 stat cards), CDN probe (detects wrong_redirect). (4) CDN probe correctly identifies production issue: CF returns 301 to autoandbid.com instead of img.autoandbid.bg. (5) Passkey reauth input focus fix confirmed in code - JSX is inlined to prevent component remount on keystroke. (6) Settings page loads without smsOpt ReferenceError.

image_upload_multipart.details: POST /api/sell/image-upload accepts multipart, returns {url, sha, ext, size_bytes, status}

image_upload_magic_byte_validation.details: Rejects text files and PDFs with 400, accepts JPG/PNG/WebP

image_status_endpoint.details: GET /api/images/status returns status + manifest for given shas

admin_image_queue.details: Returns queue stats + db stats + failed items list, requires admin/moderator auth

admin_image_queue_retry.details: Re-enqueues failed images, requires admin auth, returns 404 for non-existent

admin_cdn_health.details: Probes CDN, detects wrong_redirect when CF returns 301 to different host

settings_page_no_smsopt_error.details: Settings page loads without ReferenceError, SMS section converted to phone-only

admin_health_tab_sections.details: Shows system services (5 cards all OK), image queue (6 stat cards), CDN probe (2 cards + diagnosis)

passkey_reauth_input_focus.details: JSX is inlined (not nested component) to prevent focus loss - documented in code comments lines 155-161

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all tests use real endpoints

production_cdn_issue_detected.details: CDN probe shows CF returns 301 to https://autoandbid.com/uploads/__probe__.jpg instead of serving from img.autoandbid.bg. This matches the root cause in problem statement: deploy_frontend.yml never copied nginx config for img.autoandbid.bg vhost.
